title: Kanmani Anbudan
episodeTitle: Anbu and Kanmani Win Big Praise
description: Jeeva rewards Anbu and Kanmani for helping the restaurant secure a major victory. Meanwhile, Vennila's mother urges her to give up on Anbu and marry a wealthy businessman instead.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Ilamathi throws down a bold challenge to Kalamma, determined to defeat her. Gandhimathi expresses her wish to host a traditional newlywed feast for Ilamathi and Paraman.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Abhinaya arranges Diya's surgery funds, urging Sarala to refuse Vetri's help. After Diya's surgery, Sarala permits Tharun and Diya to reconcile with Abhinaya and Sudar.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Poongodi learns from Thenmozhi that Nandhini is heartbroken over Azhagar. Meanwhile, Sudalai informs Manjamalai about Mayandi's grand wedding plans for Azhagar and Poongodi.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Bairavi files for divorce after Arumugam's betrayal, leaving him heartbroken. He then opens up to Siva that he ruined the crops because of a challenge to prevent their separation.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
description: Ram Moorthy and Kanchana blame Suresh for beating Mathi. Thangaraj and the elders conclude the matter by ordering Suresh and Mathi to apologize to each other.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: Senthil's insistence on returning to their quarters in a few days upsets Meena. Pandian firmly declares Senthil and Meena should stay home instead of returning to their quarters.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
episodeTitle: Pallavan Share His Dream with Nila
description: Pallavan shares updates about Chandayatha's father's visit before revealing his plan to take government exams to Nila. Cheran urges a distressed Chandayatha to stay calm.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Rohini resolutely refuses to proceed with the divorce from Manoj after learning she is pregnant. Manoj denies responsibility for Rohini's pregnancy when questioned by Annamalai.

title: Chinna Marumagal
description: Tamizhselvi wins back Azhagar from Sethupathi after uncovering Eshwari's deceit in taking Meenatchi away. Later, she fiercely warns Eshwari against troubling her children.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: Madhu is determined to get Arjun married to Swetha despite his reluctance. Meanwhile, Saranya apologises to Arjun and urges Swetha to reconsider the wedding.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: Sarasu is deeply upset when Kandhasamy enrols her children in an ordinary school against her wishes. Elsewhere, Murugan bravely fights off goons and rescues Indhira from danger.
